local.description: Developer-only builds and smoke validation. Packages may be incomplete but must not be published from this channel.

canary.description: Pre-release validation channel for packages with explicit owner sign-off and rollback notes.

beta.description: Pre-stable channel for packages that have passed feature validation but still need broader installation/runtime evidence.

stable.description: Release-ready package set for tag releases after CI and package smoke validation.

disabled.description: Packages intentionally excluded from publishable release sets until their owner records validation and promotion criteria.
